expectations.evidence: File uses free-form markdown starting with '# Product Requirement Document: Employee Expense Management Tool', not product "..." { structured syntax
Section 1.1 'Problem Statement' is a narrative paragraph; no situation/complication/question structure
5 personas in table format: Employee, Manager, VP/Director, Finance Team, Compliance
Section 1.3 'Success Criteria' table has 4 metrics with Current State and Target columns (e.g. reimbursement time target 5 business days, manual entry < 10%)
Section 3.2 'Out of Scope (v1.0)' lists 5 items including corporate credit card, travel booking, multi-currency, per-diem, HR integration
No assumptions section found in the document
Section 11 'Risks and Mitigations' table lists 5 risks (OCR accuracy, SAP delays, low mobile adoption, tax rule changes, data breach)
Section 12 'Release Plan' defines 3 phases: MVP (12 weeks), Full Launch (20 weeks), Optimization (28 weeks)
